'''鈭歴h-p-ch-v''' ('''kashapchevoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:itemise|itemise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-p-ch-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:itemise|itemise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴h-p-ch-v
|-
! Lemma
| kashapchevoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishapchevoko|thishapchevoko]] || [[word:jishapchevoko|jishapchevoko]] || [[word:shishapchevoko|shishapchevoko]] || [[word:kishapchevoko|kishapchevoko]]
